shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Areas Of Fog
name: Today
detailedForecast: Areas of fog before 10am, then a slight chance of rain between 10am and noon, then areas of fog and a chance of rain between noon and 4pm, then rain likely and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a high near 38. Northeast wind 2 to 8 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
